rows.Ai Summary: The dynamic clock feature on the lock screen has stopped working after a beta software update.
rows.Severity Reason: The feature is broken but users can still use the lock screen; a workaround exists, though the functionality is missing.

rows.Title: Wi-Fi Calling Automatically Turning Off After Beta Update
rows.Problem: Wi-Fi Calling option automatically turns off as soon as it is enabled and reappears disabled when returning to settings. The issue persists despite restarts, network reset, and airplane mode toggling. Mobile data and voice calling work normally, but Wi-Fi Calling is unstable.
rows.Ai Summary: Wi-Fi Calling functionality intermittently disables after enabling, even after device restarts and network settings resets, indicating a compatibility issue with the latest One UI 8 Beta update.
rows.Severity Reason: The feature is not functioning as expected, significantly impacting user experience, though basic calling and data work normally and a workaround exists via manual toggling.

rows.Title: Sim 2 is not getting recognized
rows.Problem: After updating Beta 5, second sim from Airtel India is not getting recognized. It shows emergency calls only for the second sim. Once it also displayed the 2nd Sim not allowed message on screen.
rows.Ai Summary: A second SIM from Airtel India is not recognized after Beta 5 update, showing only emergency calls and displaying a '2nd Sim not allowed' message.
rows.Severity Reason: The second SIM is not functioning properly, preventing normal call usage, but a workaround may exist through settings or manual configuration.

rows.Title: Unable to make calls and access data
rows.Problem: Cant make calls though mobile data works. Enable 2G service in Airtel results in calls going on 2G but network shows 5G. Can make calls with Jio eSIM after restart, but not with Airtel in 5G/LTE.
rows.Ai Summary: Users cannot make calls on Airtel network despite mobile data working, with 2G calls functioning only when 2G is enabled, and network status incorrectly showing 5G.
rows.Severity Reason: Call functionality is broken on Airt-5G/LTE, preventing basic communication, but data access remains functional and a workaround exists via 2G.

rows.Title: Unable to connect watch 6 classic with device
rows.Problem: Unable to connect my Galaxy 6 Classic watch with the mobile since the upgrade. Tried multiple times on the wearable app and bluetooth but just doesnt connect.
rows.Ai Summary: Users cannot connect their Galaxy Watch 6 Classic to their mobile device after a software upgrade, despite repeated attempts using the wearable app and Bluetooth.
rows.Severity Reason: The watch connection feature is broken after an update, preventing normal device pairing, but users can still use other functions and a workaround (manual re-pairing) may exist.

rows.Title: Current app is not shown in recent

rows.Ai Summary: The current app is missing from the recent apps list, preventing users from accessing recently used applications.
rows.Severity Reason: The issue prevents access to recently used apps, which is a core usability function, but users can still navigate via other means and a workaround exists.

rows.Title: Battery icon font doesn't change according to system font settings

I set it to Agent Std Regular Latin font style, and I also changed it to Gothic Bold style, but the battery font style doesn't change. Also, many areas where the font style is thinner than usual like in One UI 7, create a readability issue.

rows.Severity Reason: The font inconsistency affects readability in specific UI versions, impacting user experience, though it does not prevent device operation or cause system failure.

rows.Title: GameHub crashes immediately
rows.Problem: GameHub crashes immediately on launch when starting PC emulation after updating to One UI 8.5 Beta 2. This setup worked correctly on stable One UI and previous updates. The problem appears to be a system-level regression related to GPU/Vulkan/JIT, introduced in the beta update.
rows.Ai Summary: GameHub crashes immediately upon launching PC emulation after a system update, indicating a system-level regression in GPU or Vulkan support.
rows.Severity Reason: The app crashes immediately on launch, preventing users from using PC emulation, which is a core feature for gaming, and the issue persists despite multiple troubleshooting steps.

rows.Title: Dynamic lock screen clock style intermittently repositions itself

The clock position shifts downward automatically, requiring manual repositioning to avoid overlap. The behavior is device-specific, occurring on Galaxy S25 but not on Galaxy S23 Ultra with similar settings and wallpapers, suggesting a layout or subject-detection inconsistency.

Addressing this issue promptly is crucial to prevent potential damage and ensure optimal system operation.
